content: Composer version constraint syntax: Exact: '1.0.2'. Wildcard: '1.0.*' (>=1.0 <1.1). Tilde ~1.2 means >=1.2 <2.0, ~1.2.3 means >=1.2.3 <1.3.0. Caret ^1.2.3 means >=1.2.3 <2.0.0, ^0.3 means >=0.3.0 <0.4.0. Range operators: >, >=, <, <=, != with AND (space/comma) and OR (||). Hyphen range: 1.0-2.0 = >=1.0.0 <2.1. Branch names: dev-main, dev-master, dev-feature-x (dev- prefix). Version-like branches: v1.x-dev (-dev suffix). Stability flags: @dev, @alpha, @beta, @RC, @stable appended to constraint e.g. '1.0.*@beta', '@dev'. Raw string display is correct approach — no normalization needed.
